name: compose-multiplatform-patterns

entries.en-US: # Compose Multiplatform Patterns
entries.zh-Hans: # Compose 多平台模式

entries.en-US: Patterns for building shared UI across Android, iOS, Desktop, and Web using Compose Multiplatform and Jetpack Compose. Covers state management, navigation, theming, and performance.
entries.zh-Hans: 使用 Compose 多平台和 Jetpack Compose 构建跨 Android、iOS、桌面和 Web 的共享 UI 的模式。涵盖状态管理、导航、主题和性能。

entries.en-US: ## When to Activate
entries.zh-Hans: ## 何时启用

entries.en-US:
- Building Compose UI (Jetpack Compose or Compose Multiplatform)
- Managing UI state with ViewModels and Compose state
- Implementing navigation in KMP or Android projects
- Designing reusable composables and design systems
- Optimizing recomposition and rendering performance
entries.zh-Hans:
* 构建 Compose UI（Jetpack Compose 或 Compose 多平台）
* 使用 ViewModel 和 Compose 状态管理 UI 状态
* 在 KMP 或 Android 项目中实现导航
* 设计可重用的可组合项和设计系统
* 优化重组和渲染性能

entries.en-US: ## State Management
entries.zh-Hans: ## 状态管理

entries.en-US: ### ViewModel + Single State Object
entries.zh-Hans: ### ViewModel + 单一状态对象

entries.en-US: Use a single data class for screen state. Expose it as `StateFlow` and collect in Compose:
entries.zh-Hans: 使用单一数据类表示屏幕状态。将其作为 `StateFlow` 暴露并在 Compose 中收集：

entries.en-US: ### Collecting State in Compose
entries.zh-Hans: ### 在 Compose 中收集状态

entries.en-US: ### Event Sink Pattern
entries.zh-Hans: ### 事件接收器模式

entries.en-US: For complex screens, use a sealed interface for events instead of multiple callback lambdas:
entries.zh-Hans: 对于复杂屏幕，使用密封接口表示事件，而不是多个回调 lambda：

entries.en-US: ## Navigation
entries.zh-Hans: ## 导航

entries.en-US: ### Type-Safe Navigation (Compose Navigation 2.8+)
entries.zh-Hans: ### 类型安全导航（Compose Navigation 2.8+）

entries.en-US: Define routes as `@Serializable` objects:
entries.zh-Hans: 将路由定义为 `@Serializable` 对象：

entries.en-US: ### Dialog and Bottom Sheet Navigation
entries.zh-Hans: ### 对话框和底部导航栏导航

entries.en-US: Use `dialog()` and overlay patterns instead of imperative show/hide:
entries.zh-Hans: 使用 `dialog()` 和覆盖层模式，而不是命令式的显示/隐藏：

entries.en-US: ## Composable Design
entries.zh-Hans: ## 可组合项设计

entries.en-US: ### Slot-Based APIs
entries.zh-Hans: ### 基于插槽的 API

entries.en-US: Design composables with slot parameters for flexibility:
entries.zh-Hans: 设计具有插槽参数的可组合项以提高灵活性：

entries.en-US: ### Modifier Ordering
entries.zh-Hans: ### 修饰符顺序

entries.en-US: Modifier order matters — apply in this sequence:
entries.zh-Hans: 修饰符的顺序很重要 — 按此顺序应用：

entries.en-US:
```kotlin
Text(
    text = "Hello",
    modifier = Modifier
        .padding(16.dp)          // 1. Layout (padding, size)
        .clip(RoundedCornerShape(8.dp))  // 2. Shape
        .background(Color.White) // 3. Drawing (background, border)
        .clickable { }           // 4. Interaction
)
```
entries.zh-Hans:
```kotlin
Text(
    text = "Hello",
    modifier = Modifier
        .padding(16.dp)          // 1. Layout (padding, size)
        .clip(RoundedCornerShape(8.dp))  // 2. Shape
        .background(Color.White) // 3. Drawing (background, border)
        .clickable { }           // 4. Interaction
)
```

entries.en-US: ## KMP Platform-Specific UI
entries.zh-Hans: ## KMP 平台特定 UI

entries.en-US: ### expect/actual for Platform Composables
entries.zh-Hans: ### 平台可组合项的 expect/actual

entries.en-US: ## Performance
entries.zh-Hans: ## 性能

entries.en-US: ### Stable Types for Skippable Recomposition
entries.zh-Hans: ### 用于可跳过重组的稳定类型

entries.en-US: Mark classes as `@Stable` or `@Immutable` when all properties are stable:
entries.zh-Hans: 当所有属性都稳定时，将类标记为 `@Stable` 或 `@Immutable`：

entries.en-US:
```kotlin
@Immutable
data class ItemUiModel(
    val id: String,
    val title: String,
    val description: String,
    val progress: Float
)
```
entries.zh-Hans:
```kotlin
@Immutable
data class ItemUiModel(
    val id: String,
    val title: String,
    val description: String,
    val progress: Float
)
```

entries.zh-Hans: ### 正确使用 `key()` 和惰性列表

entries.en-US: ### Defer Reads with `derivedStateOf`
entries.zh-Hans: ### 使用 `derivedStateOf` 延迟读取

entries.en-US: ### Avoid Allocations in Recomposition
entries.zh-Hans: ### 避免在重组中进行分配

entries.en-US: ## Theming
entries.zh-Hans: ## 主题

entries.en-US: ### Material 3 Dynamic Theming
entries.zh-Hans: ### Material 3 动态主题

entries.en-US: ## Anti-Patterns to Avoid
entries.zh-Hans: ## 应避免的反模式

entries.en-US:
- Using `mutableStateOf` in ViewModels when `MutableStateFlow` with `collectAsStateWithLifecycle` is safer for lifecycle
- Passing `NavController` deep into composables — pass lambda callbacks instead
- Heavy computation inside `@Composable` functions — move to ViewModel or `remember {}`
- Using `LaunchedEffect(Unit)` as a substitute for ViewModel init — it re-runs on configuration change in some setups
- Creating new object instances in composable parameters — causes unnecessary recomposition
entries.zh-Hans:
* 在 ViewModel 中使用 `mutableStateOf`，而 `MutableStateFlow` 配合 `collectAsStateWithLifecycle` 对生命周期更安全
* 将 `NavController` 深入传递到可组合项中 — 应传递 lambda 回调
* 在 `@Composable` 函数中进行繁重计算 — 应移至 ViewModel 或 `remember {}`
* 使用 `LaunchedEffect(Unit)` 作为 ViewModel 初始化的替代 — 在某些设置中，它会在配置更改时重新运行
* 在可组合项参数中创建新的对象实例 — 会导致不必要的重组

entries.zh-Hans: ## 参考
